name: zoom
description: Schedule and manage Zoom meetings and access cloud recordings

envVars.name: ZOOM_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Zoom OAuth Client ID (from your app in the Zoom App Marketplace)

tools.name: List Meetings
tools.description: List scheduled or upcoming Zoom meetings for the authenticated user

userId.description: Zoom user ID or 'me' for the authenticated user

type.description: Meeting type filter: scheduled, live, upcoming, upcoming_meetings, or previous_meetings

next_page_token.description: Pagination token from a previous response

historicalSummary.omitted: meeting settings, passwords, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Meeting
tools.description: Get details of a Zoom meeting by ID

tools.name: Create Meeting
tools.description: Schedule a new Zoom meeting for the authenticated user

userId.description: Zoom user ID or 'me' for the authenticated user

start_time.description: Start time in ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2026-06-15T10:00:00Z

tools.name: List Recordings
tools.description: List cloud recordings for the authenticated user

userId.description: Zoom user ID or 'me' for the authenticated user

from.description: Start date (yyyy-mm-dd) of the query window (within the last 6 months)

to.description: End date (yyyy-mm-dd) of the query window

next_page_token.description: Pagination token from a previous response

tools.name: Get My Profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated Zoom user's profile

prompts.title: Upcoming meetings
prompts.prompt: List my upcoming Zoom meetings with their start times and join links.

prompts.title: Schedule a meeting
prompts.prompt: Schedule a Zoom meeting with a topic, start time, and duration.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Zoom OAuth Setup

steps.title: Create a Zoom app
steps.description: Sign in at https://marketplace.zoom.us/ (a free Zoom account works) and choose Develop → Build App → General App (user-managed).

steps.title: Configure the redirect URL
steps.description: In the app's OAuth settings, set the OAuth Redirect URL to your app URL ending in /api/auth/zoom/callback and add it to the allow list.

steps.title: Add scopes
steps.description: Under Scopes, add the granular scopes user:read:user, meeting:read:meeting, meeting:read:list_meetings, meeting:write:meeting, and cloud_recording:read:list_user_recordings.

steps.title: Copy credentials and verify
steps.description: Copy the Client ID and Client Secret into ZOOM_CLIENT_ID and ZOOM_CLIENT_SECRET, connect your account, and run the Get My Profile tool.

notes: The token endpoint authenticates the client with HTTP Basic (base64 of client_id:client_secret)
Access tokens expire after 1 hour; refresh tokens are issued and expire after 90 days
Apps created since 2024 use granular scopes (e.g. meeting:read:list_meetings) instead of classic scopes like meeting:read
